entries.title: Stardew Valley
entries.subtitle: ConcernedApe

variants.label: Recommended
variants.whenToUse: Works out of the box with default settings
rationale: Simple 2D game with minimal GPU requirements
D3DMetal provides native Metal performance
No special configuration needed

notes: Works perfectly with default settings on both Apple Silicon and Intel
Controller support works natively through Wine input mapping
Mods using SMAPI may require additional configuration

knownIssues.description: SMAPI mod loader may fail to initialize on first run
knownIssues.workaround: Run the game once without SMAPI, then re-enable it

entries.title: Hollow Knight
entries.subtitle: Team Cherry

variants.label: Recommended
variants.whenToUse: Standard setup for all Macs
rationale: Unity-based 2D game runs well with D3DMetal
Low GPU requirements ensure stable performance
No workarounds needed

notes: Runs flawlessly on both Apple Silicon and Intel Macs
Full controller support works out of the box
Save files are compatible with other platforms

entries.title: Celeste
entries.subtitle: Extremely OK Games

variants.label: Recommended
variants.whenToUse: Works with minimal configuration on any Mac
rationale: XNA/FNA-based 2D game with very low resource usage

No additional components required

notes: Perfect performance with no configuration needed

entries.title: Elden Ring
entries.subtitle: Bandai Namco / FromSoftware

variants.label: Recommended (Apple Silicon)
variants.whenToUse: Standard setup for M-series Macs with anti-cheat disabled
rationale: D3DMetal provides best performance on Apple Silicon
Enhanced sync improves frame pacing
Shader cache reduces first-run stuttering

notes: Easy Anti-Cheat must be disabled; online play is not available
First launch may take 2-3 minutes for shader compilation
Performance improves significantly after initial shader cache is built

knownIssues.description: Occasional shader compilation stutter in open world areas
knownIssues.workaround: Enable shader cache and allow initial compilation pass to complete

knownIssues.description: Online features unavailable due to anti-cheat requirement
knownIssues.workaround: Launch with anti-cheat disabled via Steam launch options

entries.title: Cyberpunk 2077
entries.subtitle: CD Projekt Red

variants.label: Recommended (Apple Silicon)
variants.whenToUse: Best performance on M-series Macs with D3DMetal
rationale: D3DMetal provides significantly better performance than DXVK on Apple Silicon
Ray tracing must be disabled for stable performance
Shader cache is critical for reducing stuttering in Night City

variants.label: DXVK (Fallback)
variants.whenToUse: Use if D3DMetal causes graphical glitches or crashes
rationale: DXVK provides an alternative rendering path via Vulkan/MoltenVK
Async shader compilation reduces stuttering
May work better on certain GPU configurations

notes: Disable ray tracing in-game for stable performance
Medium graphics preset is recommended for M1/M2; High for M3 Pro and above
Photo mode and driving work well after shader cache warm-up

knownIssues.description: Shader compilation stuttering during first 30-60 minutes of gameplay
knownIssues.workaround: Shader cache builds over time; performance improves on subsequent launches

knownIssues.description: Occasional texture streaming delays in dense city areas
knownIssues.workaround: Lower texture quality setting by one step

entries.title: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt
entries.subtitle: CD Projekt Red

variants.label: Recommended (D3DMetal)
variants.whenToUse: Best experience for the Next-Gen update on Apple Silicon
rationale: D3DMetal handles DX12 rendering well for the next-gen update
Shader cache reduces stuttering during exploration
Enhanced sync provides smoother frame delivery

notes: Next-Gen update uses DX12 and works well with D3DMetal on Apple Silicon
Minor shader stuttering during cutscenes on first playthrough
HDR is not supported; disable it in game settings

knownIssues.description: Minor shader compilation stutter during cutscenes and area transitions
knownIssues.workaround: Shader cache improves over time; pre-load by exploring areas slowly

knownIssues.description: Ray tracing features may cause instability
knownIssues.workaround: Disable all ray tracing options in graphics settings

entries.title: Baldur's Gate 3
entries.subtitle: Larian Studios

variants.label: Recommended (D3DMetal, DX11)
variants.whenToUse: Use DX11 mode for best stability on Apple Silicon
rationale: DX11 mode is more stable than Vulkan under Wine translation
D3DMetal provides good DX11 translation on Apple Silicon
Visual C++ runtime is required for the game engine

notes: Launch bg3_dx11.exe for the DX11 renderer (more stable than Vulkan)
Visual C++ 2022 runtime must be installed via winetricks
Large character models may cause brief frame drops during combat

knownIssues.description: Vulkan renderer causes crashes; use DX11 mode instead
knownIssues.workaround: Launch bg3_dx11.exe instead of bg3.exe

knownIssues.description: Character creation screen may have rendering artifacts
knownIssues.workaround: Artifacts are cosmetic and do not affect gameplay

entries.title: Hades
entries.subtitle: Supergiant Games

variants.label: Recommended
variants.whenToUse: Standard setup for all Macs
rationale: D3DMetal handles the custom engine well
Game is lightweight and runs at high framerates
Audio workaround prevents crackling

notes: Excellent performance on both Apple Silicon and Intel
Set PULSE_LATENCY_MSEC to 60 to prevent audio crackling
Controller support works natively

knownIssues.description: Audio crackling or popping during fast-paced gameplay
knownIssues.workaround: Set PULSE_LATENCY_MSEC environment variable to 60

Game runs at solid framerates with minor config

notes: Online play requires disabling anti-cheat protections if present

knownIssues.description: Frame pacing issues may occur during boss fights
knownIssues.workaround: Enable V-Sync in game settings or use enhanced sync

knownIssues.description: Game may fail to launch or crash during loading screens
knownIssues.workaround: No reliable workaround known; try different Wine versions

variants.label: Known Broken

rationale: Rockstar Games Launcher is required and has compatibility problems
DXVK is required for the launcher but the game itself fails to start
DRM verification frequently times out or fails

notes: The Rockstar Games Launcher is required but has persistent issues under Wine
Even when the launcher works, the game often fails during DRM verification
This title may become playable with future Wine/Whisky updates

knownIssues.description: Rockstar Games Launcher fails to authenticate or hangs during DRM check
knownIssues.workaround: No reliable workaround; wait for upstream fixes

knownIssues.description: Game crashes on startup even when launcher is bypassed
knownIssues.workaround: None available

entries.title: Battlefield 2042

variants.label: Known Broken
variants.whenToUse: Game does not work due to EA launcher and anti-cheat requirements
rationale: Requires EA App launcher which has compatibility issues
Easy Anti-Cheat kernel driver does not work under Wine
Multiplayer-only game requires anti-cheat for all modes

notes: Requires both EA App launcher and Easy Anti-Cheat, both of which are problematic
This is a multiplayer-only game; anti-cheat cannot be disabled
Unlikely to work until anti-cheat vendors support Wine/macOS

knownIssues.description: EA App launcher fails to initialize properly
knownIssues.workaround: No workaround available

knownIssues.description: Easy Anti-Cheat blocks game launch even if launcher works

entries.title: Valorant
entries.subtitle: Riot Games

variants.label: Not Supported
variants.whenToUse: This game cannot run under Wine due to kernel-level anti-cheat
rationale: Vanguard anti-cheat requires a Windows kernel driver
The kernel driver cannot operate under Wine or macOS
There is no offline or anti-cheat-free mode

notes: Vanguard anti-cheat requires a Windows kernel driver that cannot run on macOS
This is a fundamental limitation; no configuration can make this game work
Consider native alternatives or cloud gaming services

knownIssues.description: Vanguard kernel-level anti-cheat prevents the game from launching
knownIssues.workaround: None; this is a fundamental incompatibility with Wine/macOS

entries.title: Fortnite
entries.subtitle: Epic Games

variants.label: Not Supported
variants.whenToUse: This game cannot run under Wine due to kernel-level anti-cheat
rationale: Easy Anti-Cheat kernel mode does not work under Wine
Epic Games has not enabled EAC Wine/Proton support for Fortnite
All game modes require anti-cheat to be active

notes: Easy Anti-Cheat in kernel mode blocks all Wine/Proton execution
Epic Games has not opted into EAC Wine support for Fortnite
Consider cloud gaming services as an alternative

knownIssues.description: Easy Anti-Cheat prevents game launch; Epic has not enabled Wine support
knownIssues.workaround: None; Epic must enable EAC Wine/Proton support, which they have not done
